MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES ATTY. ANDREW SCHULTZ FOR HERBERT THOMAS(SUCCESSOR TURSTEE)

ATTY. SCHULTZ REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT ONCE THE PETITION IS GRANTED, THE PROPERTY REVERTS BACK TO THE CONSERVATEE AS AN INDIVIDUAL. THE GRANT DEED CONVEYING THE REAL PROPERTY TO THE TRUST IS RESCINDED OR PULL OUT OF THE TRUST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

Petn. To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Andrew Schultz appearing for and with petitioner/temporary trutee Herb Thomas. Arthur Park appearing as court appointed counsel for Mrs. Simpson. Mr. Schultz has not heard from Dr. Criswell. He has not responded to counsel's request for the trust document. Court directed Mr. Schultz to file a petition for substituted judgment to creat a new trust. This petition to bring trust under court supervision is granted without knowing what the trust is. No one has seen the trust. Order signed. Bond is set at $22,000.00. Status for filing of inventory and appraisment is set on 3/5. Status for filing of 1st account is set on 2/26/08.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Omar.
